name: Suite 12 — Table Coverage (non-Tickets root tables)
description: Regression suite for the table-bias fixes. EVERY case roots on a non-Tickets table, with simple list / count / filter shapes equivalent to suite-1. Lets us measure whether the schema retriever + verified-query catalog still find the right root when the question is unambiguously about Users / Roles / Comments / Attachments / Categories / Statuses / Sources / Priorities / Entities — not Tickets. A regression here means the bias has crept back in.

Scenarios.Question: how many users are there
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: users with their email and phone
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email, PhoneNumber FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: how many roles do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM AspNetRoles

Scenarios.Question: users with their roles
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, r.Name AS RoleName FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id LEFT JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId

Scenarios.Question: how many statuses are configured
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM TicketStatuses

Scenarios.Question: how many categories exist
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM TicketCategories

Scenarios.Question: how many sources are configured
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM TicketSources

Scenarios.Question: how many priority levels
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM TicketPriorities

Scenarios.Question: how many comments are there
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM TicketComments

Scenarios.Question: latest 10 comments
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 Content, CreatedAt FROM TicketComments ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: how many attachments are there
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM TicketAttachments

Scenarios.Question: how many entities do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Entitys
